svg.title: SVG Picture created as FInal_simpino.svg date 2020/06/27 00:16:58

g.style: fill:#000000; fill-opacity:1;stroke:#000000; stroke-opacity:1; stroke-linecap:round; stroke-linejoin:round;

g.text: Dedicated to All Opensource Hardware Users
Leds for Pin 13, Power and TX & RX.
Works only on 5V usb power input. Uses 0805 form factor & SMD components only.
A simple Arduino Uno rev 2 with micro usb female pin for programing.
Voltage regulator: Takes the input form externally applied
voltage [Vin Pin] and restricts it to 5 V.
Micro controller connections from voltage regulator, CH340c, ICSP, Reset button, IO ports etc.
ICSP pins for Progrmaing the MCU form ICSP programmer
Micro USB to Ch340C logic converter
Arduino Uno Rev 2 IO pins to connect to various parts
10K Resistor to Reset pin on MCU.
and maintain Vcc at RST pin
